generated_oml:
instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the styrofoam container for internal temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside the styrofoam container for internal temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer outside the styrofoam container for ambient temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, AmbientTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors used for model validation and parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller for GPIO operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation software for thermal behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation for thermal behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety compliance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for temperature dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureStateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization via model calibration to improve accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal behavior for system operation"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected system performance violations triggering safety actions"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed and fan based on safety monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in thermal system components"
]

instance TemperatureStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated temperature dynamics for system state"
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters based on sensor feedback"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214 x 214 x 3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply. The system regulates internal temperature regardless of content."
    base:contains Container, Heatbed, Fan, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, AmbientTempSensor, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation and handling ~4A current"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214 x 214 x 3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed activation, fan speed) generated by the DT controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical actuators using MOSFETs for current handling."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized DT constellation comprising RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), controller, low-level driver, and thermal models, with all components communicating via message-based interactions over RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1) and parameter calibration minimizing residual error; Model B better predicts heatbed thermal inertia with four parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based communication using AMQP protocol over local network; Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server for message exchange between PT components and DT services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, models) are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in the low-level driver to prevent unsafe actuation; bang-bang controller with defined upper/lower temperature limits (LL, UL) ensures operational safety."
]
